@PuebloPainting hey! let me break down $AIOT #AIOTUSDT on the 1h for you real quick 👀

- expecting price to RISE overall, bullish bias remains strong as long as 0.110828 holds as support
- first target is 0.144490, then if momentum continues, looking for a sweep of the most recent high at 0.145345
- entry opportunity on retrace to the 0.118726–0.110828 zone, ideally with a bullish engulfing or LTF reversal wick as confirmation
- take profit at 0.144490, partials at 0.139825 if momentum slows
- if price closes below 0.110828, bias flips to short, targeting 0.098000 next
- avoid longs if you see strong rejection or manipulation above 0.145345 without follow-through
